detailed_description: The video highlights the difference between an idealized perception of a "healthy" body and its natural appearance, particularly in the evening. It starts with the creator posing with a sucked-in, flat stomach, labeled as the "healthy" look. She then visibly relaxes her abdominal muscles, revealing a naturally bloated stomach, which she labels "how it really looks." Her expression shifts from tense to a relaxed and happy smile, conveying a powerful message of body positivity and self-acceptance, normalizing natural bodily fluctuations.

segments.why_kept: This entire segment is the semantic core as it clearly demonstrates the 'before' (sucked-in stomach) and 'after' (relaxed/bloated stomach) of the body's appearance, explicitly contrasting societal ideals with reality. The emotional shift from a strained pose to a relaxed, happy expression, combined with the explanatory text overlays, delivers the core message of body positivity and normalization.
